hook.summary: Introduction of a 3D character model named 'Soul Eater' with detailed stats and skills.
hook.visual_action: A female character in a red and black outfit holding a large scythe rotates 360 degrees against a dark background.
hook.text_overlay: 모델 보기, 소울 이터, 공격 897, 방어 687, 치명타 799, 스피드 750, HP 690

scene_flow: Display of character 'Soul Eater' with detailed RPG stats and skill icons.
The character performs a full 360-degree rotation to show off the 3D model.
The rotation highlights the weapon design and character costume from all angles.
audience_proxy: Male gamers interested in dark fantasy RPGs and stylized character designs.
